_note: English message templates extracted from api/webhooks_variety.py, api/webhooks_harvest.py, api/webhooks_trader.py.
satellite_detected: Satellite has detected {crop} on your farm.
variety_saved: ✅ {variety} saved! Now send your full name:
send_full_name: Please send your full name (min 3 letters).
name_saved: ✅ Name saved! Confirm your phone number:
phone_confirmed: ✅ Number confirmed! Send your village name:
village_saved: ✅ Village saved! Send your farm area in acres:
send_farm_area_acres: Send your farm area in acres (numbers only, e.g. 3.5):
area_acres_invalid: Please send acres as a number (e.g. 3.5).
you_will_receive_daily_report: From tomorrow you will receive your daily farm report at 6 AM! 🌱
flowering_detected: Your mango trees have started flowering.
fruit_set_detected: Fruit set has been detected on your mango trees.
harvest_ready: Your mangoes will be ready to harvest in {days} days.
hold_for_days: Hold for {days} more days — prices likely to rise.
frost_risk_tonight: ⚠️ Frost risk tonight. Protect your crop.
heat_stress_warning: ⚠️ Heat stress: temperature {temp}°C. Irrigate in the morning.
mismatch_acres_question: {name} ji, you mentioned {reported_acres} acres but satellite shows {amed_acres} acres. Please confirm:
harvest_yield_question: What was your harvest this season? Please send total yield in kg/acre:
harvest_sold_date_question: Send date sold (DD-MM-YYYY or today / yesterday):
trader_welcome: Hello {name}! Welcome to ShetMitra Trader Intelligence. You have a FREE 4-week trial starting today.
trader_subscription_reminder: Hello {name}, your free trial ends in {days} days. To continue receiving intelligence, choose a tier below.
trader_subscription_menu:
Choose a subscription tier:
BASIC — Rs 3,000/month: Reply B
STANDARD — Rs 7,000/month: Reply S
PREMIUM — Rs 15,000/month: Reply P
trader_subscription_selected: You selected {tier} — Rs {amount}/month. Pay to activate: {link}
trader_subscription_confirmed: Hello {name}, payment confirmed. {tier} tier is now ACTIVE. Valid until: {valid_until}.
trader_cancellation_confirmed: Subscription cancelled. You can resume anytime by replying RESUME.
